goal: Track the exact production geospatial, seasonal-flow, aerial, protected-access, and reference-media evidence required before South Fork American, Colorado River, and Pacuare Unreal environments can be promoted from source-aware previews to lifelike production river maps.

global_source_leads.production_use: DEM/lidar discovery, slope, bank breaks, canyon/valley terrain, Unreal Landscape source rasters
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record product ids, acquisition dates, CRS, vertical datum, void review, hydrologic conditioning, channel burning, attribution, and package/LFS policy before replacing preview terrain.

global_source_leads.production_use: Flowline, tributary, catchment, and river-alignment cross-checks
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Clip selected products into the corridor, record CRS and attribution, compare to visible imagery and guide-reviewed rapid/eddy annotations.

global_source_leads.provider: USGS Water Services / Water Data for the Nation
global_source_leads.production_use: Daily and instantaneous discharge, stage, flow percentiles, release-band sanity checks
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Attach current station metadata, units, temporal coverage, quality flags, and guide/release interpretation before final gameplay flow bands.

global_source_leads.provider: USDA/APFO NAIP ImageServer via The National Map
global_source_leads.production_use: High-resolution U.S. aerial color, banks, bars, vegetation, water-edge masks
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Replace sample exports with selected orthomosaic tiles or service-derived corridor rasters that record acquisition year/date, resolution, CRS, attribution, and redistribution status.

global_source_leads.production_use: Seasonal color, vegetation and water history, dry/wet comparison, cloud-screening backup
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record scene ids, dates, processing level, cloud score, bands used, and whether any derivative is high enough resolution for masks.

global_source_leads.production_use: Coarse cloud-screened rainforest color and seasonal preview context
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Keep as preview/context unless a layer and resolution are explicitly approved for production derivatives with date, CRS, layer, and terms metadata.

global_source_leads.production_use: Higher-resolution cloud-screened Pacuare vegetation, river color, and mask generation
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record scene ids, acquisition dates, processing level, cloud score, terms, and attribution before committing derivatives.

global_source_leads.provider: Copernicus DEM GLO-30 Public on AWS Open Data
global_source_leads.production_use: Fallback rainforest gorge terrain and slope source
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Clip to corridor, select Costa Rica working CRS, handle vertical datum, void-review, condition channels, burn river, compare to official layers and guide review before Unreal Landscape promotion.

global_source_leads.provider: Sistema Nacional de Informacion Territorial de Costa Rica / IDECORI
global_source_leads.production_use: Official Costa Rica layer discovery for hydrography, imagery, protected areas, access, and possible terrain products
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record exact service/layer names, CRS, terms, attribution, redistribution constraints, and publication sensitivity before importing any layer.

global_source_leads.provider: Instituto Meteorologico Nacional de Costa Rica
global_source_leads.production_use: Rainfall, weather, storm timing, and flash-response sanity checks
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Record station ids, variables, units, time zone, access terms, and basin relation before replacing relative Pacuare flow bands.
Confirm public access, station relevance, variables, terms, and redistribution permission.

global_source_leads.production_use: Protected-area, conservation, sensitive-location, and publication-risk review
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Attach exact layers or review notes before publishing detailed route geometry, access points, or screenshots of sensitive areas.

global_source_leads.production_use: Glen Canyon Dam release context for rowing flow bands and big-water feature timing
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Attach release series/metadata and compare against USGS Lees Ferry and downstream gauges before final Colorado flow presets.

global_source_leads.production_use: River trip context, launch/takeout sensitivity, route review, official media leads
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Use for context and official-media leads only; record item-level media metadata and publication constraints before game asset use.

global_source_leads.provider: First-party capture, guide/outfitter permission, official/public-domain media, or per-item Creative Commons review
global_source_leads.production_use: Visual fidelity, hazard behavior, guide-seat framing, surf/flush/pin sanity, rescue visibility
global_source_leads.promotion_gate: Attach creator, date, exact or approximate reach, observed flow/rain/weather, license or permission, attribution, and allowed use before packaging or texture/material derivation.

terrain_dem_or_lidar.promotion_blocker: Pilot DEM tiles are attached, but they still need mosaic/clip, CRS/vertical-datum review, void review, hydrologic conditioning, channel burning, and guide/geospatial approval before Landscape promotion.

hydrography_and_centerline.promotion_blocker: Selected NHD/3DHP product still needs download, clipping, CRS review, imagery alignment, and guide rapid/eddy annotations.

aerial_or_satellite_imagery.promotion_blocker: Pilot NAIP tiles are attached, but they still need provider metadata/acquisition-date review, mosaic/clip, CRS/terms review, mask derivation, and guide/geospatial approval before production drape use.

water_and_vegetation_masks.promotion_blocker: Masks are deterministic preview derivatives from source imagery and a bounded channel prior; they require hydrography/bank alignment, scene review, seasonal variants, wet-rock classification, and guide/geospatial approval.

seasonal_flow_or_release_history.promotion_blocker: USGS 11445500 returned no P30D instantaneous discharge or stage time series on 2026-07-06; CDEC CBR now has a first reproducible event-window pull, but CDEC terms, flag meanings, broader representative windows, station-to-reach relation, release context, and guide review are still needed before all seasonal flow visuals are final.

protected_area_and_access_context.promotion_blocker: Need access, private/public land, put-in/take-out, evacuation, and sensitive-location review before detailed production maps.

guide_and_reference_media_annotations.promotion_blocker: Need first-party capture or explicit item-level rights plus guide notes before reference media can drive production art.

terrain_dem_or_lidar.promotion_blocker: Covers only a preview sample near Lees Ferry plus 2x2 official-service pilot derivatives; full canyon terrain still needs mosaic/clip, CRS and vertical-datum review, tiling expansion, stationing, hydrologic conditioning, canyon-wall material breakup, and guide/oarsman review.

hydrography_and_centerline.promotion_blocker: Need 3DHP/NHD or NPS/GCMRC river-mile aligned centerline, rapid annotations, tributaries, camps/access context, and solver corridor stationing.

aerial_or_satellite_imagery.promotion_blocker: Sample export and 2x2 NAIP pilot drape do not cover the full rowing prototype corridor or canyon visual diversity; needs provider metadata/acquisition-date review, mosaic/clip, CRS/terms review, selected orthomosaics/satellite scenes, and guide/oarsman approval before production drape use.

water_and_vegetation_masks.promotion_blocker: Masks are deterministic preview derivatives from source imagery and a bounded big-water channel prior; they require full-corridor water edge, sandbar, wet-rock, tamarisk/cottonwood/scrub classes, release-band variants, and guide/oarsman approval.

seasonal_flow_or_release_history.promotion_blocker: USBR Glen Canyon Dam release context and guide/oarsman review are still needed before final release-dependent visuals.

protected_area_and_access_context.promotion_blocker: Need NPS route/publication constraints, camps/access sensitivity, permits context, and media item metadata before production route packages.

guide_and_reference_media_annotations.promotion_blocker: Need first-party/oarsman footage or explicit permissions for big-water feature behavior, oar-rig sightlines, and canyon atmosphere.

terrain_dem_or_lidar.promotion_blocker: Pacuare now has coarse public/global production-import derivatives, but terrain still needs Costa Rica working CRS, vertical datum handling, clipping, void review, hydrologic conditioning, channel burning, official-layer comparison, and guide review.

hydrography_and_centerline.promotion_blocker: Need exact SNIT/IDECORI/MINAE layer ids or HydroSHEDS fallback review before centerline and tributaries become authoritative.

aerial_or_satellite_imagery.promotion_blocker: Pacuare now has a coarse source-product pilot derivative, but MODIS/GIBS remains too coarse and partly cloudy; production needs Sentinel/Landsat scene metadata, official orthophoto discovery, or first-party/permissioned aerial reference.

water_and_vegetation_masks.promotion_blocker: Masks are coarse preview derivatives; production needs higher-resolution cloud-screened water, canopy, wet-rock, waterfall/mist, and bank classes.

seasonal_flow_or_release_history.promotion_blocker: Numeric flow tuning remains blocked until Costa Rica gauge/rainfall/station metadata and guide review are attached.

protected_area_and_access_context.promotion_blocker: Exact protected-area/access layers and local publication-risk review are required before detailed Pacuare route packages.

guide_and_reference_media_annotations.promotion_blocker: Need first-party or explicit outfitter/guide permissions for rainforest canopy, water color, waterfalls, mist, and rapid behavior.

next_import_order: Pick one river for a full-corridor production import pilot instead of spreading downloads thinly across all three.
For the selected pilot, attach full corridor DEM/lidar plus hydrography, then produce a clipped conditioned heightfield and river/bank polygons.
Attach full-resolution aerial/satellite or orthomosaic data with acquisition metadata and derive reviewed water, vegetation, wet-rock, and bank masks.
Promote only rights-cleared or first-party references into annotation records; keep social links as manual review leads.
Regenerate Unreal maps from the production corridor package and capture lifelike review frames before checking the broad production-data item complete.
